addons_config.description: Configuration block for enabling or disabling various Kubernetes add-ons, such as HTTP load balancing, Cloud Run, or Node Local DNS.
addons_config.type: list(object({cloudrun_config: list(object({disabled: bool,load_balancer_type: optional(string)})),config_connector_config: list(object({enabled: bool})),dns_cache_config: list(object({enabled: bool})),gce_persistent_disk_csi_driver_config: list(object({enabled: bool})),gcp_filestore_csi_driver_config: list(object({enabled: bool})),gcs_fuse_csi_driver_config: list(object({enabled: bool})),gke_backup_agent_config: list(object({enabled: bool})),horizontal_pod_autoscaling: list(object({disabled: bool})),http_load_balancing: list(object({disabled: bool})),network_policy_config: list(object({disabled: bool})),parallelstore_csi_driver_config: list(object({enabled: bool})),ray_operator_config: list(object({enabled: bool,ray_cluster_logging_config: list(object({enabled: bool})),ray_cluster_monitoring_config: list(object({enabled: bool}))})),stateful_ha_config: list(object({enabled: bool}))}))

allow_net_admin.description: Determines whether network administrators are granted permissions within the Kubernetes Engine cluster; must be set based on organizational access policies.

authenticator_groups_config.description: Configures Google Groups for RBAC role bindings, specifying the security group for authentication.

binary_authorization.description: Enables Binary Authorization for the cluster to enforce image verification policies.

cluster_autoscaling.description: Configures cluster autoscaling settings, enabling automatic adjustment of node pool sizes based on resource usage.
cluster_autoscaling.type: list(object({auto_provisioning_locations: optional(list(string)),autoscaling_profile: optional(string),enabled: optional(bool),auto_provisioning_defaults: list(object({boot_disk_kms_key: optional(string),disk_size: optional(number),disk_type: optional(string),image_type: optional(string),min_cpu_platform: optional(string),oauth_scopes: optional(list(string)),service_account: optional(string),management: list(object({auto_repair: optional(bool),auto_upgrade: optional(bool),upgrade_options: optional(list(object({auto_upgrade_start_time:string,description:string})))})),shielded_instance_config: list(object({enable_integrity_monitoring: optional(bool),enable_secure_boot: optional(bool)})),upgrade_settings: list(object({max_surge: optional(number),max_unavailable: optional(number),strategy: optional(string),blue_green_settings: list(object({node_pool_soak_duration: optional(string),standard_rollout_policy: list(object({batch_node_count: optional(number),batch_percentage: optional(number),batch_soak_duration: optional(string)}))}))}))})),resource_limits: list(object({maximum: number,minimum: optional(number),resource_type: string}))}))

cluster_ipv4_cidr.description: Defines the IP address range for the cluster's pods, specified in CIDR notation. Must not overlap with any existing network CIDR ranges.

confidential_nodes.description: Enables confidential computing on all nodes in the cluster; must be used with supported machine types.

control_plane_endpoints_config.description: Configuration for the control plane endpoints, specifying how the cluster's API server is accessed and exposed.
control_plane_endpoints_config.type: list(object({dns_endpoint_config: list(object({allow_external_traffic: optional(bool),endpoint: optional(string)})),ip_endpoints_config: list(object({enabled: optional(bool)}))}))

cost_management_config.description: Configures cost management settings for the cluster, including parameters for tracking and optimizing resource usage.

database_encryption.description: Specifies the configuration for database encryption, including the key to encrypt Kubernetes secrets. Requires a Google Cloud KMS key.

datapath_provider.description: Specifies the network datapath provider for the cluster; options are 'LEGACY_DATAPATH' or 'ADVANCED_DATAPATH'.

default_max_pods_per_node.description: Specifies the maximum number of pods that can run on a single node; must be a non-negative integer.

default_snat_status.description: Controls whether default SNAT is enabled for the cluster; must be a valid configuration for the cluster's networking setup.

deletion_protection.description: Enables protection against accidental deletion of the cluster; set to true to prevent deletion.

description.description: Specifies the description of the GKE cluster; can be used to provide context or details about the cluster's purpose.

disable_l4_lb_firewall_reconciliation.description: Determines whether automatic firewall rule reconciliation for L4 load balancers is disabled; set to true to disable.

dns_config.description: Configures DNS settings for the Kubernetes cluster, including features like private DNS and Cloud DNS integration.

enable_autopilot.description: Enables Autopilot mode for the cluster, which manages and optimizes infrastructure and operations automatically; requires Kubernetes version compatibility.

enable_cilium_clusterwide_network_policy.description: Enables the use of Cilium cluster-wide network policies for enhanced security and traffic management; requires the cluster to support Cilium networking.

enable_fqdn_network_policy.description: Determines whether the Fully Qualified Domain Name (FQDN) network policy is enabled for the cluster, allowing domain-based restrictions for network traffic.

enable_intranode_visibility.description: Controls whether intra-node visibility is enabled, allowing packets sent between nodes to pass through the cluster's virtual network. Must be set to true or false.

enable_k8s_beta_apis.description: Determines whether Kubernetes beta APIs are enabled for the cluster; requires compatibility with the cluster version and features.

enable_kubernetes_alpha.description: Enables Kubernetes alpha features; setting this to true is irreversible and may include breaking changes.

enable_l4_ilb_subsetting.description: Enables L4 Internal Load Balancer subsetting, allowing backend services to distribute traffic only to healthy nodes. Requires private cluster and network configuration.

enable_legacy_abac.description: Enables or disables the Legacy ABAC authorization mode for the cluster; must be set to false for enhanced security.

enable_multi_networking.description: Determines if multi-networking is enabled for the cluster, allowing the use of multiple network interfaces.

enable_shielded_nodes.description: Specifies whether Shielded Nodes are enabled, providing additional security features for node instances.

enable_tpu.description: Enables the use of Cloud TPUs in the cluster; requires TPU support to be available in the selected zone.

enterprise_config.description: Specifies the configuration for enabling enterprise features in the cluster, such as advanced security or access controls.

fleet.description: Specifies the configuration for the Anthos fleet integration, enabling features such as service mesh, workload identity, and other fleet-specific functionalities.
fleet.type: list(object({membership: optional(string),membership_id: optional(string),membership_location: optional(string),pre_registered: optional(bool),project: optional(string)}))

gateway_api_config.description: Configuration for the Gateway API feature, enabling or disabling the feature and specifying additional settings if required.

identity_service_config.description: Configuration for enabling and managing workload identity service on the cluster; must be a valid identity service configuration block.

initial_node_count.description: Specifies the number of nodes to create in the initial node pool; must be a non-negative integer.

ip_allocation_policy.description: Defines the IP allocation settings for the cluster, including whether to use VPC-native IPs and the specific ranges for pods and services.

location.description: Specifies the zone or region where the cluster will be created; must match the format for Google Cloud locations.

logging_config.description: Defines the logging configuration for the Kubernetes cluster, specifying the services or components for which logs should be enabled or disabled.

logging_service.description: Specifies the logging service used by the cluster, such as 'logging.googleapis.com/kubernetes' for Cloud Logging. Use 'none' to disable logging.

maintenance_policy.description: Specifies the maintenance policy for the cluster, including maintenance windows and exclusions; must follow GKE maintenance policy format.
maintenance_policy.type: list(object({daily_maintenance_window: list(object({duration: optional(string),start_time: string})),maintenance_exclusion: list(object({end_time: string,exclusion_name: string,start_time: string,exclusion_options: list(object({scope: string}))})),recurring_window: list(object({end_time: string,recurrence: string,start_time: string}))}))

master_auth.description: Defines the authentication methods for accessing the Kubernetes master endpoint, including options for username-password, client certificates, and disabling authentication.

master_authorized_networks_config.description: Specifies the CIDR blocks and their corresponding descriptions to allow access to the Kubernetes master endpoint; must be a list of authorized networks.

mesh_certificates.description: Enables or disables the issuance of Mesh Certificates for the cluster, used for service mesh features.

min_master_version.description: Specifies the minimum Kubernetes version for the cluster's master node; must match or exceed the supported versions for the selected cluster region.

monitoring_config.description: Configuration for monitoring settings in the Kubernetes cluster, including components to be enabled or disabled.
monitoring_config.type: list(object({enable_components: optional(list(string)),advanced_datapath_observability_config: list(object({enable_metrics: bool,enable_relay: bool})),managed_prometheus: list(object({enabled: bool,auto_monitoring_config: list(object({scope: string}))}))}))

monitoring_service.description: Specifies the monitoring service used for the cluster. Must be one of "monitoring.googleapis.com" (Cloud Monitoring) or "none".

name.description: Name of the Google Kubernetes Engine cluster, must be unique within the project and region.

network.description: Specifies the network in which the cluster is created; must be a VPC network in the same project.

network_policy.description: Enables or disables network policy in the cluster; requires the cluster to have a compatible network plugin such as Calico.

networking_mode.description: Specifies the networking mode for the cluster, such as VPC-native or routes-based. Ensure compatibility with the cluster's networking configuration.

node_config.description: Configuration for the nodes in the cluster, including machine type, disk size, and other settings.

node_locations.description: Specifies the zones in which the cluster's nodes should be created; must be within the cluster's region.

node_pool_auto_config.description: Enables automatic configuration of node pools to optimize security and performance.
node_pool_auto_config.type: list(object({resource_manager_tags: optional(map(string)),linux_node_config: list(object({cgroup_mode: optional(string)})),network_tags: list(object({tags: optional(list(string))})),node_kubelet_config: list(object({insecure_kubelet_readonly_port_enabled: optional(string)}))}))

node_pool_defaults.description: "Defines default configuration settings for node pools, including options like machine type, disk size, and auto-scaling policies."
node_pool_defaults.type: list(object({node_config_defaults: list(object({insecure_kubelet_readonly_port_enabled: optional(string),logging_variant: optional(string),containerd_config: list(object({private_registry_access_config: list(object({enabled: bool,certificate_authority_domain_config: list(object({fqdns: list(string),gcp_secret_manager_certificate_config: list(object({secret_uri: string}))}))}))})),gcfs_config: list(object({enabled: bool}))}))}))

node_version.description: Specifies the Kubernetes version to use for the nodes in the cluster. Must match available versions for the selected region and cluster configuration.

notification_config.description: Specifies the notification configuration for the cluster, including Pub/Sub topics for sending notifications.
notification_config.type: list(object({pubsub: list(object({enabled: bool,topic: optional(string),filter: list(object({event_type: list(string)}))}))}))

private_cluster_config.description: Configures the private cluster settings, including private nodes and access control for master and node communication.
private_cluster_config.type: list(object({enable_private_endpoint: optional(bool),enable_private_nodes: optional(bool),master_ipv4_cidr_block: optional(string),peering_name: optional(string),private_endpoint: optional(string),private_endpoint_subnetwork: optional(string),public_endpoint: optional(string),master_global_access_config: list(object({enabled: bool}))}))

private_ipv6_google_access.description: Controls the availability of private Google access for nodes and pods in the cluster. Can be set to `PRIVATE_IPV6_GOOGLE_ACCESS_DISABLED`, `PRIVATE_IPV6_GOOGLE_ACCESS_TO_GOOGLE`, or `PRIVATE_IPV6_GOOGLE_ACCESS_BIDIRECTIONAL`.

release_channel.description: Determines the release channel for the cluster, such as rapid, regular, or stable, to control the cadence of cluster updates.

remove_default_node_pool.description: Determines whether the default node pool should be removed from the cluster during creation; must be true if custom node pools are to be used.

resource_labels.description: Defines key-value pairs to organize and categorize the cluster, useful for filtering and identifying resources. Constraints: Maximum 64 labels per cluster, keys must be 1-63 characters, and values must be 0-63 characters.

resource_usage_export_config.description: Configures the export of resource usage data to a specified BigQuery dataset.

secret_manager_config.description: Configures the use of Secret Manager for storing Kubernetes secrets, specifying whether Secret Manager is enabled and any associated settings.

security_posture_config.description: Configures the security posture for the cluster, including features like shielded nodes and workload identity; must comply with GKE security settings.

service_external_ips_config.description: Configures external IPs for Kubernetes services, specifying whether external IPs are allowed.

subnetwork.description: Specifies the subnetwork to which the cluster will be connected; must exist in the same region as the cluster.

timeouts.description: Defines the timeout duration for operations on the Kubernetes cluster, such as creation, update, or deletion.

user_managed_keys_config.description: Specifies whether to use user-managed keys for Google Kubernetes Engine cluster's encryption, requiring pre-existing Cloud KMS keys.

vertical_pod_autoscaling.description: Enables automatic adjustment of resource requests and limits for pods based on usage metrics.

workload_identity_config.description: Configures Workload Identity for the cluster, allowing Kubernetes service accounts to act as Google service accounts.
